summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HireReady AI MVP - AI-powered Resume & Placement Readiness Platform. All core backend APIs functional, frontend user flows working, authentication system secure, and AI integrations operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Sidebar navigation not visible on JD Match page in certain viewport conditions
ui_bugs.workaround: Quick action buttons on dashboard work as alternative navigation

passed_tests: User login flow with token validation
Resume upload and AI analysis (ATS scoring 75/100)
Free plan usage limit enforcement (2 analyses max)
